name: Electric Beach (Kahe Point)
tagline: Warm water from the power plant outflow attracts spinner dolphins, sea turtles, and tropical fish in ridiculous abundance.
parking: Small gravel lot right off Farrington Hwy; comes and goes quickly
bestTime: Early morning for dolphins and calm water; weekdays to avoid crowds
talkStory: The power plant next door pumps warm water into the ocean, creating this wild ecosystem right off shore. Spinner dolphins cruise through here regularly — you can see them from shore. Snorkeling is best on the left side near the outflow pipe. Currents can be strong so this isn't for beginners. Bring your own gear; there are no rentals nearby. One of the most unique ocean experiences on Oahu.
